title: Prohibition. The agency granted with a provisional license will not be
content: 28 allowed to accredit a previously accredited principal/employer. 29 30 However, it may be allowed to enroll a previously enrolled vessel provided the same has 31 no prior deployment and is not in the active list of enrolled vessels for the past twelve (12) 32 months or more, and meets other conditions as may be prescribed by the Department. 33 34 Only agencies granted with regular licenses shall be allowed to deploy fishers. No agency 35 shall be issued provisional licenses for deploying fishers. 36 37 C. REGULAR LICENSE 38 39
